calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confrim Finra-Dr Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-14-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC.'s Petition And Motion To Confirm FINRA-DR Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Charles Schwab & Co., Inc.'s unopposed "petition and motion to confirm FINRA-DR arbitration award" is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
